name: hermes-agent
description: Obsidian plugin: chat with a locally installed Hermes Agent via its gateway HTTP API.

scripts.build:test: esbuild src/runtime/protocol.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --outfile=tests/.build/protocol.mjs && esbuild src/runtime/context.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --outfile=tests/.build/context.mjs && esbuild src/runtime/history.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --outfile=tests/.build/history.mjs
